classData.comment:
/**
 * @summary Service for handling autonomous subagent state transitions.
 *
 * This service provides a deterministic state-trap mechanism for headless orchestrators
 * to signal execution states, allowing for robust lifecycle management and self-healing.
 *
 * @class Neo.ai.services.github-workflow.AgentStateService
 * @extends Neo.core.Base
 * @singleton
 */
classData.summary:
Service for handling autonomous subagent state transitions.

This service provides a deterministic state-trap mechanism for headless orchestrators
to signal execution states, allowing for robust lifecycle management and self-healing.
classData.name: AgentStateService

classData.comment:
/**
     * Handles state transition signals from autonomous agents.
     * @param {Object} options                The options object
     * @param {String} options.state          The execution state to signal (PR_OPENED, BLOCKED, HANDOFF)
     * @param {Number} [options.target_id]    The target Issue or PR number associated with this state
     * @param {String} [options.artifact_path] Optional file path to a localized artifact mapping the problem
     * @returns {Promise<Object>} A promise resolving to the transition outcome.
     */
classData.description: Handles state transition signals from autonomous agents.

params.description: The execution state to signal (PR_OPENED, BLOCKED, HANDOFF)
params.name: options.state

params.description: The target Issue or PR number associated with this state
params.name: options.target_id

params.description: Optional file path to a localized artifact mapping the problem
params.name: options.artifact_path

returns.description: A promise resolving to the transition outcome.

classData.name: signalStateTransition
